title: UV-B and UV-C most interesting for crop protection
subtitle: UV-B en UV-C interessantst voor gewasbescherming
description: A practice abstract detailing the effectiveness of UV-B and UV-C light as physical control methods against powdery mildew fungi in vegetable production within an Integrated Pest Management context. It outlines application benefits, safety measures for operators, and potential reductions in chemical pesticide use.
